headline: The Home Depot Canada Foundation kicks off spring with its Orange Door Project campaign to end youth homelessness
summary: The Home Depot Canada Foundation is proud to announce the launch of its annual Orange Door Project spring campaign from May 12th to June 14th, raising critical funds to prevent and end youth homelessness in Canada. Building on the success of previous campaigns, including $2.9 million raised during the 2025 campaigns, The Home Depot Canada Foundation aims to raise $1.3 million this spring to continues to drive meaningful support for youth serving organizations in communities nationwide.
